mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bids WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'SELECTED' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bids ( request_id, business_id, price, expected_due_date, as_available, description, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{businessId}, #{price}, #{expectedDueDate}, #{asAvailable}, #{description}, 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, bs.login_id AS businessLoginId, bs.company_name AS companyName FROM bids b LEFT JOIN business bs ON bs.business_id = b.business_id WHERE b.request_id = #{requestId} AND b.status != 'HIDDEN' ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM bids WHERE business_id = #{businessId} AND status != 'HIDDEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT b.*, bs.login_id AS businessLoginId, bs.company_name AS companyName FROM bids b LEFT JOIN business bs ON bs.business_id = b.business_id WHERE b.bid_id = #{bidId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bids SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE bid_id = #{bidId}
UPDATE bids SET status = 'REJECTED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND bid_id != #{selectedBidId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(price) FROM bids WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT request_id, hope_price, status FROM request WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, customer_id, business_id, bid_id, total_amount, payment_status, accept_status, due_date, created_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{businessId}, #{bidId}, #{totalAmount}, 'READY', 'PENDING', #{dueDate}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT total_amount FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, kit_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, NULL, 1, #{totalAmount})
mapper.select: SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT c.address, c.phone_number AS phoneNumber FROM customer c JOIN request r ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE r.request_id = #{requestId}
SELECT order_no FROM orders WHERE bid_id = #{bidId} AND payment_status = 'PAID' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
